metadata.title: SEU Development | Premium Real Estate in Georgia
metadata.description: SEU Development - Building dreams into reality since 2016. Premium residential and commercial properties in prime locations across Georgia.

landing.aboutText1: SEU Development has been operating in the real estate market since 2014.
landing.aboutText2: The company's team, consisting of experienced professionals who care about continuous development, implements high construction standards and uses innovative and modern approaches that meet European standards.
landing.aboutText3: Successfully completed projects by SEU Development include the old and new buildings of the Georgian National University, which house modern educational and exhibition facilities, as well as a business center in the suburbs of Tbilisi. All SEU Development construction projects are fully funded at an early stage, which ensures they are completed on time.
landing.companyDescription: The company's team, consisting of experienced professionals, cares about continuous development, adheres to high construction standards and uses innovative technologies.

benefitsList.b1: Up to 2 hectares of recreational space;
benefitsList.b9: There will be a lobby at the entrance to each building;

about.missionText1: SEU Development has been operating in the real estate market since 2014.
about.missionText2: The company's team, consisting of experienced professionals who care about continuous development, implements high construction standards and uses innovative and modern approaches that meet European standards.
about.missionText3: Successfully completed projects by SEU Development include the old and new buildings of the Georgian National University, which house modern educational and exhibition facilities, as well as a business center in the suburbs of Tbilisi. All SEU Development construction projects are fully funded at an early stage, which ensures they are completed on time. The company's social responsibility ensures that it only uses energy-efficient building materials for its projects.
about.missionText4: SEU Development aims to create a multifunctional residential complex that meets the needs and wishes of each client and ensures that such projects are accessible to every member of society.
about.teamDescription: Successfully completed projects by SEU Development include the old and new buildings of the Georgian National University, which house modern educational and exhibition facilities, as well as a business center in the suburbs of Tbilisi.

about.marketingDesc1: SEU Development has been operating in the real estate market since 2014
about.marketingText1: The career development and alumni relations department in Georgia's National University SEU provides quality services designed to assist students and graduates in developing successful careers and makes guide a handbook covering Career Development.
about.marketingText2: Various employment and career coaching services are offered to students and graduates by the appropriate organizations representing either the private or public sector.
about.marketingText3: Training sessions, workshops, public lectures, job fairs, individual consultations, travel, regarding employment, on-site and online professional, university or community available scholarships. Through its comprehensive services, the department supports students and graduates in developing skills and making connections that are important to them, which further the country's higher socio-economic progress.
about.marketingText4: Students and alumni can benefit from counseling in the career development and alumni relations service, both in person and through email and telephone communications.
about.marketingText5: Career development and alumni national department is offering students and graduates career counseling. Sessions are conducted individually face to face, as well as in small and telephone communications.

card.title: SEU CARD
card.description: When buying property in any of the company's projects, clients will receive an exclusive personalized SEU card. Residents will be able to use the card at the company's partner establishments, taking advantage of exclusive conditions and discounts. You can see the full list of our partners below:

news.title: News
news.featuredDesc: SEU Development participated in the International Business Forum, showcasing our latest projects and vision for the future of real estate in Georgia.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Find your dream apartment in just a few clicks using our interactive visual search — explore projects, buildings, and floor plans visually.

0.title: Choose a Project
0.description: Browse our available developments and select the project that interests you. Each project features detailed renders and location info.

1.title: Select a Building
1.description: Explore the project's render image and click directly on the building you'd like to view. Interactive highlights guide your selection.

2.title: Pick a Floor
2.description: Navigate through floors visually. See availability at a glance and choose the floor that suits your preference.

3.title: Find Your Apartment
3.description: View the floor plan with all units highlighted. Tap any apartment to see its size, layout, price, and availability instantly.
